subcodes.first_line: The call of that noble one was heard, and from the missive sent were inhaled the sweet fragrances of love for the Desired One of the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ندای آنجناب شنیده شد و نفحات محبت مقصود عالمیان از نامه مرسوله استشمام گشت
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
